properties.name: Anopheles gambiae Giles, 1900
properties.title: Vector occurrence weak label
properties.summary: Anopheles gambiae Giles, 1900 is a vector occurrence label used as dengue or malaria ecological context. It is presence-biased and does not confirm current local transmission.
